subject: english
learning_objectives: Analyze the relevance of media communication
Apply the rules of sequence of tenses

sections.heading: Reading for Critical Evaluation: Communication
sections.content: The Nigerian film and television industry is doing well but lacks relevance to our culture. Most programs shown are imported and depict alien cultures. This has led to the loss of our indigenous values.

sections.heading: Structure: Introduction to Sequence of Tenses
sections.content: The rule states that all verbs in a sentence or series of sentences should remain in the same tense. If the first verb is in the past, others should follow. Exception: When referring to a general fact or universal truth. Example: The teacher taught us that the earth goes round the sun.
